search_candidates.title: IOI Group: Annual, Sustainability & Financial Reports
search_candidates.content: # Comprehensive Reports with Key Insights. ## Stay Informed and Updated with Us. Access to comprehensive reporting suite, which offers stakeholders valuable insights into our financial performance, sustainability initiatives, and corporate governance practices. We are committed to transparency and accountability, ensuring that our investors, customers, and partners have the information they need to make informed decisions. ## Reports. ###### Annual Report 2025. ## Contact Us. ##### Mr Amir Mohd Hafiz bin Amir Khalid. ###### Investor Relations. Level 28, IOI City Tower 2, Lebuh IRC,. ## Every official announcement from Bursa Malaysia. Lebuh IRC, IOI Resort City,. A global leader in sustainable palm oil, resource-based manufacturing, and renewables, we drive innovation, operational excellence, and environmental stewardship. Committed to our stakeholders, we create lasting value while empowering communities and preserving the planet for present and future generations. Copyright © 2026 IOI Corporation Berhad 196901000607 (9027-W).
